tagline: Your Trusted Pool & Spa Professionals Since 2015

hero.headline:
Pool Care With the TLC Your Pool
Deserves
hero.subheadline: You bought a pool to relax, not to stress over chemicals and cloudy water. Let the Eastern Panhandle's only CPO-certified maintenance team handle every detail so you can simply enjoy the swim.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From Install to Enjoy
services.subtitle: From brand-new Radiant Pool installations to weekly maintenance contracts, we handle everything so your backyard stays your favorite place to be.

cards.title: Pool Installation
cards.description: Authorized Radiant Pools dealer offering above ground, partially in-ground, or fully in-ground installations tailored to your yard and budget.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal preparation done right. We get your pool swim-ready for summer and properly winterized to prevent costly freeze damage.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: The area's only maintenance contract program. Regular cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks so your pool is always sparkling.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Service
cards.description: Expert spa maintenance, repair, and seasonal care to keep your hot tub running safely and efficiently all year long.

cards.title: Water Testing & Treatment
cards.description: Bring a water sample to our store and our certified staff will test it on the spot, then recommend exactly what your pool needs.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Supply Store
cards.description: Full retail shop stocked with chemicals, accessories, and equipment. Our knowledgeable staff helps you find exactly what you need.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Worry-Free Pool Care

steps.title: Call or Visit Our Store
steps.description: Give us a call or stop by our Inwood location. Tell us about your pool or spa and we'll walk you through your options with zero pressure.

steps.title: We Create Your Care Plan
steps.description: Our CPO-certified team inspects your pool, tests your water, and builds a service plan tailored to your needs — from one-time fixes to ongoing maintenance contracts.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready. With the area's only maintenance contract, you never have to worry about your pool again.

about.label: Why Eastern Panhandle Trusts TLC
about.headline: Family-Owned, Certified, and Committed to Your Pool
about.description: Since 2015, TLC Pool & Spa Services has brought over 30 years of combined professional experience to every pool and spa in the Inwood area. We're CPO and NSPF certified, and we're the only local company offering true maintenance contracts — because you deserve peace of mind, not another chore. From our retail store on Middleway Pike to your backyard, we treat every pool like it's our own.

features.title: 30+ Years Combined Experience
features.description: Our team brings decades of hands-on pool and spa knowledge to every job, big or small.

features.title: Only Local Maintenance Contracts
features.description: We're the only company in the area offering ongoing maintenance contracts for true worry-free pool care.

features.title: Loyalty & Military Discounts
features.description: We reward returning customers with our loyalty program and proudly offer military discounts to those who served.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Real Value.
pricing.subtitle: From one-time service calls to full maintenance contracts, we offer flexible options that fit your needs and your budget.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool water isn't clear and balanced after our service, we'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. We've built our reputation on doing the job properly the first time, and we stand behind every visit. Your satisfaction isn't just a promise — it's how we've earned loyal customers for over a decade.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Eastern Panhandle of West Virginia, including Inwood, Martinsburg, Berkeley County, and surrounding communities. Stop by our store at 853 Middleway Pike in Inwood or give us a call to discuss your needs.

faqs.question: What makes your maintenance contracts different?
faqs.answer: We're the only company in the area offering true maintenance contracts. This means regularly scheduled visits, chemical balancing, equipment checks, and priority service — all bundled into one predictable plan so you never have to think about pool care again.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team holds both CPO (Certified Pool Operator) and NSPF (National Swimming Pool Foundation) certifications. This means we follow industry best practices for water safety, chemical handling, and equipment maintenance.

faqs.question: Can I just bring in a water sample?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Bring a water sample to our retail store in Inwood and our staff will test it on the spot. We'll explain the results and recommend exactly which chemicals you need to get your water balanced and clear.

faqs.question: Do you offer military discounts?
faqs.answer: Yes, we proudly offer a military discount to active duty, veterans, and their families. We also have a loyalty program for returning customers. Just ask us about either when you call or visit.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: First time using TLC and I am now a customer for life. We took a water sample in the store and the staff was kind and super knowledgeable. After running a test and getting us the chemicals we needed, within 2 days we are back to a clear pool!

testimonials.name: Thomas E.
testimonials.text: They are always able to help me get my pool water looking good. Great service and friendly staff every time I visit.

testimonials.name: Happy Customer
testimonials.text: They are amazing people and I have had the best service I could ask for. Even though we had trouble with our pool, TLC Pool & Spa was always there to help!

contact.headline:
Ready for Pool Care You
Can Actually Count On?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from the Eastern Panhandle's only CPO-certified pool care team. Call us or stop by our Inwood store today.
